description_long: This object is a pair of metallic tweezers with a simple, utilitarian design. The body is composed of two elongated, flat arms that taper to a fine, angled point at one end, suitable for precision gripping or pinching. The surface shows a dark, slightly mottled finish with hints of reddish-brown discoloration, possibly indicating oxidation or rust. The tweezers lack any visible ergonomic features or decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The construction appears to be a single piece of metal, with no separate handle or blade components. The overall appearance suggests a tool commonly found in urban environments for tasks requiring fine manipulation.
description: A pair of metallic tweezers with a dark, slightly rusted finish and pointed tips for precision gripping.
description_view_0: The tweezers are seen from an angled top view, highlighting the pointed tips and the slight separation between the arms.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the tweezers and the gradual tapering towards the tips, with visible surface discoloration.
description_view_2: This view shows the tweezers from the opposite angle, emphasizing the flat, broad base and the narrowing towards the tips.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective displays the parallel alignment of the arms and the subtle color variations along the metal surface.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, flat, straight metal arms with no ergonomic features
